grammatical: Ik weet dat Jan Marie Piet de kinderen zag helpen laten zwemmen.
ungrammatical: Ik weet dat Jan Marie Piet de kinderen zwemmen laten helpen zag.
notes: Example from Bresnan et al. (1982). Full verb reversal. V3=laten follows V2=helpen; attested in source despite laten appearing in chain position.

grammatical: Ik weet dat Jan Marie Piet de kinderen zag helpen laten zwemmen.
ungrammatical: Ik weet dat Jan Marie Piet de kinderen zag helpen zwemmen laten.
notes: Partial permutation V1V2V4V3: final pair swapped. Preserves NP1-V1 (Jan-zag) and NP2-V2 (Marie-helpen). Disrupts NP3-V3 (Piet now followed by zwemmen instead of laten) and NP4-V4 (de kinderen now followed by laten instead of zwemmen). Tests model sensitivity to the innermost dependency pair. Replaces the earlier single Variant D record for this sentence.

grammatical: Ik weet dat Jan Marie Piet de kinderen zag helpen laten zwemmen.
ungrammatical: Ik weet dat Jan Marie Piet de kinderen zag laten helpen zwemmen.
notes: Partial permutation V1V3V2V4: middle pair swapped. Preserves NP1-V1 (Jan-zag) and NP4-V4 (de kinderen-zwemmen). Disrupts NP2-V2 (Marie now followed by laten instead of helpen) and NP3-V3 (Piet now followed by helpen instead of laten). Tests model sensitivity to the two middle dependencies. The most surprising result would be highest sensitivity here, as neither primacy nor recency explains it.

grammatical: Ik weet dat Jan Marie Piet de kinderen zag helpen laten zwemmen.
ungrammatical: Ik weet dat Jan Marie Piet de kinderen helpen zag laten zwemmen.
notes: Partial permutation V2V1V3V4: first pair swapped. Preserves NP3-V3 (Piet-laten) and NP4-V4 (de kinderen-zwemmen). Disrupts NP1-V1 (Jan now followed by helpen instead of zag) and NP2-V2 (Marie now followed by zag instead of helpen). Tests model sensitivity to the outermost dependency pair. V1=zag is the only finite verb in the cluster; placing it in V2 position also creates a morphosyntactic anomaly since a finite form appears where an infinitive is expected, which is a confound worth noting in analysis.
